channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: 'AI has reinvented computing and is driving the largest computing infrastructure buildout in history': Nvidia invests $4 billion in photonics firms as it looks to boost its next generation of AI chips
item.description: Nvidia commits $4 billion to Lumentum and Coherent, advancing optical interconnects and AI tools for next-generation data centers.

item.title: Gas Tax Holiday Floated as Band-Aid for Skyrocketing Prices at the Pump
item.description: Democratic senators have pitched the Gas Prices Relief Act.

item.title: In a vote of confidence for Meta’s Threads, Kalshi adds sharing feature
item.description: Kalshi now offers a share option that will automatically embed the relevant prediction market chart into a Threads post.

item.title: 'The technological innovation anticipated from 6G...will require fundamental protections and mitigations to be considered': Governments look to secure 6G networks — despite them not even really existing yet
item.description: Governments launch voluntary 6G security and resilience principles, emphasizing early integration, AI management, supply chain diversification, and industry collaboration.

item.title: Optimisation du réseau électrique américain | Tesla, Google et des partenaires lancent un projet
item.description: Tesla, Google, des industriels et des éditeurs de logiciels spécialisés ont annoncé mardi la création d’une organisation dédiée à l’optimisation du réseau électrique américain, notamment grâce au développement accéléré des batteries.

item.title: Mario will be green with envy at his brother’s new Mach 8 Mario Kart Lego set — and I desperately want it too
item.description: Luigi gets his MAR10 day win with an excellent new Mario Kart Lego set that puts his brother’s to shame.

item.title: How the spiraling Iran conflict could affect data centers and electricity costs
item.description: Soon after the Trump administration launched its war on Iran, I called up Reed Blakemore, director of research and programs at the Atlantic Council Global Energy Center, to talk about the consequences. While oil and gas prices were already on the rise, there was still more hope then that the impact of the conflict might […]

item.title: The case for bringing your ‘whole self’ to work
item.description: So long as your ‘self’ is actually whole. Spend enough time in corporate America, and somewhere along the line you’ll hear the refrain: Bring your whole self to work. It’s become the mantra of modern management—printed on culture decks, repeated in leadership off-sites, and embedded in HR rhetoric.

item.title: The Producers of ‘Cowboy Bebop’ Are Trying Not to Disappoint Shinichiro Watanabe Again
item.description: 'Samurai Champloo' is getting a live-action adaptation from the team behind 'One Piece' and 'Cowboy Bebop,' with more Watanabe input this time around.

item.title: Supercharge your living room setup with $400 off this TCL 85-inch QLED TV
item.description: As of March 10, save $400 on the TCL 85-inch QLED TV at Amazon.

item.title: A live-action Samurai Champloo is in the works
item.description: Though the live-action Cowboy Bebop was a big disappointment, Shinichirō Watanabe is ready to give it another go with one of his other iconic pieces of IP. Variety reports that Watanabe has given his blessing and agreed to work on a new live-action Samurai Champloo adaptation from Tomorrow Studios, the same production house behind Netflix's […]

item.title: Listen to the Live Nation CEO’s alleged threats to a concert venue
item.description: Was it a threat or a reality check? That's a key question in the government's anti-monopoly case against Live Nation, which is currently in limbo after the Justice Department reached a settlement with the company and as dozens of states push ahead. The Verge obtained the audio of a 2021 call at the center of […]
